task_completion.description: Verify successful login to NOSH ChartingSystem.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The NOSH ChartingSystem dashboard is visible, and the active user is indicated as 'demo_provider' or the practice 'Hillside Family Medicine' is displayed.

task_completion.description: Verify the patient chart for Corine Ziemann is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The active patient chart displays the name 'Corine Ziemann' and/or DOB 'November 29, 2000' in the patient header or demographic section.

task_completion.description: Verify navigation to the Family History section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A section, tab, or modal specifically labeled 'Family History' is open and visible within Corine Ziemann's chart.

task_completion.description: Verify the family history form is populated with the correct relationship and condition.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The input fields for adding a new family history entry show 'Father' selected or typed for the relationship, and 'Type 2 diabetes' entered for the condition/disease.

task_completion.description: Verify the family history record is successfully saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Family History list or table for Corine Ziemann displays a saved entry containing both 'Father' and 'Type 2 diabetes'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser GUI to interact with the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a standard web browser interface being used to navigate NOSH, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent is interacting with the actual NOSH ChartingSystem.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches the NOSH ChartingSystem web application, not a text editor, mock HTML file, or generic notes application.

integrity.description: Verify the browser developer tools were not used to fake the final record.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's Developer Tools (Inspect Element, Console) are not open or being used to inject the text 'Type 2 diabetes' into the page.
